$schema_note: Canonical machine-readable data for the ClickUp Super Agent fleet. Hand-edit THIS file; index.html renders it, index.md points at both. Do not maintain a parallel table anywhere. See audit-instruction.md for the audit workflow and metadata-schema.md for the sidecar envelope.

agents.notes: Fleet Steward. Reference implementation for v1.0.
Next in queue for declaration + audit.
Track (full-standard) to confirm; check lane overlap with Milo.
Sets due date = origination date + 1 month. Exempt.

status_legend.up-to-date: Full-Standard agent verified against current golden-standard version.
status_legend.needs-declaration: Full-Standard agent with no repo declaration folder yet.
status_legend.needs-re-audit: Standard bumped or config changed; re-verify.
status_legend.behind: Known gaps against the current golden standard.
status_legend.inventory-only: Task-Specific / Exempt; tracked but not held to the full standard.

changelog: 2026-07-15: split from index.md table into JSON data + index.html renderer (single data source). Corey up-to-date on v1.0.
